Passcode Sign-in Requirements & Custom P:
* Cashier
Allowed:
Process sales, returns, and exchanges
Apply basic discounts (fixed percentage only)
Open/close cash drawer
View own transaction history
Not Allowed:
Edit product prices
Access sales reports
Issue refunds over ₱500
Add/remove users
* Barista
Allowed:
Record orders and mark items as prepared
View menu and inventory levels (read-only)
Request stock replenishment
Clock in/out
Not Allowed:
Handle cash or payments
Modify menu items
View financial data
Access user settings
* Manager
Allowed:
All Cashier + Barista permissions
Issue full refunds and custom discounts
Edit product prices and inventory
Generate daily/weekly sales reports
Reset passcodes for Cashiers/Baristas
Open/close the store system
Not Allowed:
Create or delete Admin accounts
Change system-wide security settings
Access payroll data
* Admin
Allowed:
All permissions from all roles
Create, edit, or delete any user account
Set/modify all passcode rules and security policies
Access all reports, logs, and financial data
Configure system settings and integrations
Manage user roles and permissions
No restrictions on system access or actions
